revision.comment: [[Category‐ノート:政府機関]]での合意に基いて作成された、[[:Category:各国の行政機関]]の下位カテゴリとして新規作成。
revision.text:
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|各国の政治|日本の政治|日本の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|組織 (団体)|各国の組織|日本の組織}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|各国の行政機関}}
{{Catmore}} {{Catlink|廃止された日本の国家機関}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きようせいきかん}} [[Category:日本の行政]] [[Category:日本の組織]] [[Category:各国の行政機関|にほん]] [[de:Kategorie:Japanische Behörde]] [[en:Category:Government agencies of Japan]] [[ko:분류:일본의 관공청]] [[zh:Category:日本官公廳]]

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|各国の政治|日本の政治|日本の行政}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|組織 (団体)|各国の組織|日本の組織}} * {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|各国の行政機関}}
{{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|日本の行政機関|break=yes}} {{Catmore}} {{Catlink|廃止された日本の国家機関}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きようせいきかん}} [[Category:日本の行政]] [[Category:日本の組織]] [[Category:各国の行政機関|にほん]] [[de:Kategorie:Japanische Behörde]] [[en:Category:Government agencies of Japan]] [[ko:분류:일본의 관공청]] [[zh:Category:日本官公廳]]

revision.comment: ロボットによる 除去: [[en:Category:Government agencies of Japan]] (missing),[[zh:Category:日本官公廳]],[[de:Kategorie:Japanische Behörde]],[[ko:분류:일본의 관공청]] (strongly connected to [[ja:Category:日本の官公庁]])

revision.comment: [[Special:Diff/85363522#pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行|Bot作業依頼]]: [[MediaWiki‐ノート:Common.css#特定テンプレート用のCSSをTemplateStylesに移行する提案（8回目）|pathnavboxクラスのテンプレート移行]] (insource:/class=[" ]*pathnavbox/) - [[User:Cewbot/log/20190913|log]]
品質保証提案
本カテゴリに関係する議論の告知: [[プロジェクト‐ノート:日本の行政機関#Category:日本の行政機関 (都道府県別)について]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag missing en interwiki
revision.text:
== (2025-05-16T04:48:00Z): (Text replacement - "links on [[Category" to "links on [[:Category")==
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:日本の教育行政機関]].
== (2025-05-16T00:54:39Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)==
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .
[[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:日本の教育行政機関]] [[ja:Category:日本の行政機関]] [[nl:Category:Ministeries van Japan]] [[zh:Category:日本行政機關]] {{translated page|ja|Category:日本の行政機関|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Government agencies by country]] [[Category:品質保証提案中のカテゴリ]] [[Category:提案があるページ]] [[Category:Government of Japan]] [[Category:Japanese administration]] [[Category:日本の行政組織法]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]]

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Merge [[Category:品質保証提案中のカテゴリ]] into [[Category:Categories under quality assurance proposal]] via bot
Text replacement - ": (Text replacement - "" to ""
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="

Text replacement - "[[Category:[[Category:" to "[[Category:"
Text replacement - "↵]]↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom

Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Removing from [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9675256)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Pathnavbox|
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|各国の政治|日本の政治|日本の行政}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|各国の行政機関}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|政治|行政|各国の行政|日本の行政|日本の行政法|日本の行政組織法}}
* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|組織 (団体)|各国の組織|日本の組織|日本の政府}}
}}
{{CfQAtext|年=2024|月=12|日=23}}
{{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|日本の行政機関|break=yes}}
{{Catmore}}
{{Catlink|廃止された日本の国家機関}}
{{citation needed|きようせいきかん}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:日本の行政機関|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:日本の行政機関|version=104945008}}
{{wikidata link|Q9675256}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[ja:Category:日本の行政機関]]
[[nl:Category:Ministeries van Japan]]
[[zh:Category:日本行政機關]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:日本の教育行政機関]]
[[Category:Administrative Organization Act of Japan]]

[[Category:Categories under quality assurance proposal]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

[[Category:Government agencies by country]]

[[Category:Japanese administration]]
[[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]
[[Category:Pages with Proposed Changes]]

* {{Pathnav|主要カテゴリ|社会|組織 (団体)|各国の組織|日本の組織|日本の政府}}
}}
{{CfQAtext|年=2024|月=12|日=23}}
{{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|日本の行政機関|break=yes}}
{{Catmore}}
{{Catlink|廃止された日本の国家機関}}
{{citation needed|きようせいきかん}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:日本の行政機関|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
